name: Avanto
instructions:
+3 Cards
You may play a Sauna from your hand.

name: Black Market
instructions:
+$2
Reveal the top 3 cards of the Black Market deck. Play any number of Treasures from your hand. You may buy one of the revealed cards. Put the rest on the bottom of the Black Market deck in any order.
-----
Setup: Make a Black Market deck out of different unused Kingdom cards.

name: Captain
instructions: Now and at the start of your next turn: Play a non-Duration, non-Command Action card from the Supply costing up to $4, leaving it there.

name: Church
instructions:
+1 Action
Set aside up to 3 cards from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand, then you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Dismantle
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. If it costs $1 or more, gain a cheaper card and a Gold.

name: Envoy
instructions: Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one. Discard that one and put the rest into your hand.

name: Governor
instructions:
+1 Action
Choose one; you get the version in parentheses: Each player gets +1 (+3) Cards; or each player gains a Silver (Gold); or each player may trash a card from their hand and gain a card costing exactly $1 ($2) more.

name: Marchland
instructions:
Worth 1 VP per 3 Victory cards you have (round down).
-----
When you gain this, +1 Buy, and discard any number of cards for +$1 each.

name: Prince
instructions: You may set aside (on this) a non-Duration, non-Command Action card from your hand costing up to $4. At the start of each of your turns, play that card, leaving it set aside.

name: Sauna
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may play an Avanto from your hand.
This turn, when you play a Silver, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Sauna/Avanto
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Sauna on top, then 5 copies of Avanto. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

name: Stash
instructions:
$2
-----
When shuffling this, you may look through your remaining deck, and may put this anywhere in the shuffled cards.

name: Summon
instructions: Gain an Action card costing up to $4. Set it aside. If you did, then at the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Walled Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
At the start of Clean-up, if you have this and no more than one other Action card in play, you may put this onto your deck.
